short_text: Kingma to Markram, Caught by Edwards!! Netherlands are celebrating while the umpires get together to confirm whether the
full_text: Kingma to Markram, Caught by Edwards!! Netherlands are celebrating while the umpires get together to confirm whether the catch is taken cleanly. They've sent it upstairs. Markram is shaking his head. Length ball down leg, he looks to clip it away but it nips in and he gets a faint inside edge. Edwards dives across to the left and it's hard to say for sure if the ball has touched the ground or not. Third umpire is convinced that the fingers are underneath the ball. Oh we might have a game on our hands here.

short_text: Kingma to Reeza Hendricks, de Kock Run Out!! Oh dear, de Kock has been run out after a terrible mix-up. Full ball strayi
full_text: Kingma to Reeza Hendricks, de Kock Run Out!! Oh dear, de Kock has been run out after a terrible mix-up. Full ball straying down leg, Hendricks misses and it goes off his pad to short fine. There's plenty of indecision on his part about going for the single. He comes down, then turns back, then goes again before eventually deciding to abort. Meanwhile, de Kock is more than halfway down the pitch and there's no way back for him as van Meekeren returns the throw at the bowler's end.
